Sandbox_IKFRVP_Enabled_tooltip:
Turns all IKFRVP vehicle changes on or off.

When off, vehicles behave as in the base game.

When on, behavior depends on the settings in the other IKFRVP tabs.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_ProfileTuning_tooltip:
When on, vehicles specifically supported by IKFRVP (the 'roster') receive high-quality, realistic tuning.

Recommended: ON.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericMultiplierTuning_t:
When on, vehicles NOT in the roster will use the simple sliders in this section.

When off, those vehicles are unchanged by this mod.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_AuditOnly_tooltip: When on, the mod calculates changes but doesn't apply them. Only useful for modders checking logs.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CSRCompatibilityMode_tool: Recommended ON if you use the 'Common Sense Reborn' mod. Prevents conflicts.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CSRTowAssistCompensation_: Slightly reduces engine power if CSR's tow-assist is set too high, to keep things realistic.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CSRTowAssistCompensationS: 0 = No reduction, 1 = Full reduction. Blends the effect.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_DebugLogging_tooltip: Writes technical info to the console. Leave OFF unless you are troubleshooting an issue.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HandlingPhysics_tooltip:
When on, the mod adjusts steering, traction, and suspension.

NOTE: Some car mods might behave strangely with this. Recommended OFF unless you want to experiment.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_BrakeBaseRetain_tooltip: 1.0 = Realistic/Original brakes. Lower values make brakes feel 'softer' or less responsive initially.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CorneringTuning_tooltip: When on, makes it easier to turn and maneuver at very low speeds (like parking). Prevents tires from spinning uselessly when starting from a stop.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CornerGripMult_tooltip: Higher values make low-speed turning even easier. 1.0 is the standard setting.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SteeringResponseMult_tool: How fast the wheels turn when you press the key. Higher = Faster response.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SteeringClampMult_tooltip: Higher values allow the wheels to turn sharper at low speeds.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_WheelGripMult_tooltip: Higher values give more grip on all surfaces. Lower values make cars slide more.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_BodyRollMult_tooltip: How much the car leans in corners. Higher = More lean.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SuspensionFirmness_toolti: Higher values make the suspension stiffer (less bouncy). Too high might cause physics glitches.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_ProbeIntervalTicks_toolti: How often to print debug info. Higher = Less spam in logs.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_PowerScale_tooltip: Global multiplier for engine power on all roster vehicles. 1.0 is default.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_EngineTorqueMult_tooltip: A final multiplier applied to EVERY car the mod tunes. Use this to easily make all cars faster or slower.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_TrunkCapacityTuning_toolt: When on, the mod adjusts trunk/bed capacity based on the slider below. Turn OFF if you use another mod for trunk sizes.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_TrunkCapacityMult_tooltip: 1.0 = Default capacity. Higher values let you carry more in trunks and truck beds.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_MassScale_tooltip: Global multiplier for vehicle weight. Heavier cars take longer to stop and accelerate.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportPowerBias_tooltip: Extra power multiplier specifically for Sport class vehicles.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyVehiclePowerBias_too: Extra power multiplier specifically for Heavy class vehicles (Trucks, Vans).
Sandbox_IKFRVP_TrailerMassScale_tooltip: Multiplier for trailer weight. Heavier trailers are harder to tow.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericEngineForceMultipl: Multiplier for cars NOT in the roster. Only works if 'Tune Other Vehicles' is ON.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericMassMultiplier_too: Multiplier for weight on cars NOT in the roster.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CompactEngineMult_tooltip: Multiplier for engine power specifically for Compact cars.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CompactMassMult_tooltip: Multiplier for weight specifically for Compact cars.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CompactRollMult_tooltip: How far the car rolls when you let go of the gas. Higher = Slows down faster (more engine braking). Lower = Rolls further.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CompactBrakeMult_tooltip: How strong the brakes are for Compact cars.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_CompactReverseMult_toolti: How fast Compact cars can go in reverse.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_StandardEngineMult_toolti: Multiplier for engine power specifically for Standard cars.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_StandardMassMult_tooltip: Multiplier for weight specifically for Standard cars.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_StandardRollMult_tooltip: How far the car rolls when you let go of the gas. Higher = Slows down faster.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_StandardBrakeMult_tooltip: How strong the brakes are for Standard cars.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_StandardReverseMult_toolt: How fast Standard cars can go in reverse.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportEngineMult_tooltip: Multiplier for engine power specifically for Sport cars.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportMassMult_tooltip: Multiplier for weight specifically for Sport cars.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportRollMult_tooltip: How far the car rolls when you let go of the gas. Higher = Slows down faster.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportBrakeMult_tooltip: How strong the brakes are for Sport cars.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_SportReverseMult_tooltip: How fast Sport cars can go in reverse.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyEngineMult_tooltip: Multiplier for engine power specifically for Heavy vehicles.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyMassMult_tooltip: Multiplier for weight specifically for Heavy vehicles.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyRollMult_tooltip: How far the car rolls when you let go of the gas. Higher = Slows down faster.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyBrakeMult_tooltip: How strong the brakes are for Heavy vehicles.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_HeavyReverseMult_tooltip: How fast Heavy vehicles can go in reverse.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_TrailerMassMult_tooltip: An additional weight multiplier for trailers.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericRollMult_tooltip: How far non-roster cars roll when you let go of the gas.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericBrakeMult_tooltip: How strong the brakes are for non-roster cars.
Sandbox_IKFRVP_GenericReverseMult_toolti: How fast non-roster cars can go in reverse.
